creator: pat@patmaddox.com
text:
This was a strange one...

somehow my CURRENT build produces files with mtimes in the future. I guess somewhere in the build chain, the port didn't build a needed file because... well I'm not quite sure why.

Anyway, I changed the clock to be in the future and it builds correctly.

So I will close this, because the problem appears to be with how my CURRENT gets built.
